- <a href="contributing.html#prerequisites"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Prerequisites</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#repository-structure"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Repository Structure</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#project-roles"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Project Roles</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#your-first-contribution"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Your
  First Contribution</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#step-1-set-up-your-environment"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Step 1: Set Up Your Environment</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#step-2-find-something-to-work-on"

  style="padding-left:1rem">Step 2: Find Something to Work On</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#step-3-make-your-change"

  style="padding-left:1rem">Step 3: Make Your Change</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#step-4-submit-a-pull-request"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Step 4: Submit a Pull Request</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#what-makes-a-good-contribution"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">What Makes a Good Contribution</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#types-of-contributions"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Types
  of Contributions</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#small-changes-direct-pr"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Small Changes (Direct PR)</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#major-changes-sep-required"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Major Changes (SEP Required)</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#working-with-the-specification-repository"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Working
  with the Specification Repository</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#schema-changes"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"

- <a href="contributing.html#documentation-changes"

- <a href="contributing.html#major-protocol-changes"

- <a href="contributing.html#working-with-the-sdk-repositories"

  style="padding-left:1rem">Finding a Sponsor for SEPs</a>
- <a href="contributing.html#troubleshooting"

- <a href="contributing.html#my-pr-has-been-sitting-unnoticed-for-weeks"

Get Involved

# Contributing to MCP

How to contribute to the Model Context Protocol project

</div>

class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Contributing to MCP" page-href="/community/contributing">

<span data-as="p">The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open source
project that welcomes contributions from the community. This guide walks
you through everything you need to get started.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#before-you-begin"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Before You Begin</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#prerequisites"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisites</span>

<span data-as="p">Before contributing, ensure you have the following
installed and ready:</span>

- **<a href="https://git-scm.com/downloads" class="link" target="_blank"
  rel="noreferrer">Git</a>** - For cloning repositories and submitting
  changes
- **<a href="https://nodejs.org/" class="link" target="_blank"
  rel="noreferrer">Node.js 24+</a>** - Required for building and testing
  our projects
- **npm** - Comes with Node.js, used for dependency management
- **<a href="https://github.com/signup" class="link" target="_blank"
  rel="noreferrer">GitHub account</a>** - For submitting pull requests
  and issues
- **Language-specific tooling** - If contributing to an SDK, you’ll need
  the appropriate development environment for that language (e.g.,
  Python, Rust, Go)

<span data-as="p">Verify your setup:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="3" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
node --version  # Should be 24.x or higher
npm --version   # Should be 11.x or higher
git --version   # Any recent version
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">These commands work the same on macOS, Linux, and
Windows, so you’re good to go on any platform.</span>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#repository-structure"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Repository Structure</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP spans multiple repositories in the
<a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol</code></a>
organization on GitHub. Here are a few notable sub-projects worth
checking out:</span>

<div class="[--page-padding:20px] overflow-x-auto flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-[var(--page-padding)] max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"
table-wrapper="true">

<div class="px-[var(--page-padding)] grow max-w-none table">

| Repository | Contents |
|----|----|
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol</code></a> | Specification, docs, SEPs |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk</code></a> | TypeScript/JavaScript SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk</code></a> | Python SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk</code></a> | Go SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/java-sdk" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/java-sdk</code></a> | Java SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/kotlin-sdk"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/kotlin-sdk</code></a> | Kotlin SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk</code></a> | C# SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/swift-sdk" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/swift-sdk</code></a> | Swift SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/rust-sdk" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/rust-sdk</code></a> | Rust SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/ruby-sdk" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/ruby-sdk</code></a> | Ruby SDK |
| <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk</code></a> | PHP SDK |

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Throughout this guide, **specification repository**
refers to `modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol`, which contains
the protocol spec, this documentation site, and
<a href="sep-guidelines.html" class="link">Spec Enhancement Proposals
(SEPs)</a>.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#project-roles"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Project Roles</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP follows a
<a href="governance.html" class="link">governance model</a> with
different levels of responsibility:</span>

- **Contributors** - Anyone who files issues, submits PRs, or
  participates in discussions (that’s you!)
- **Maintainers** - Steward specific areas like SDKs, documentation, or
  <a href="working-interest-groups.html" class="link">Working Groups</a>
- **Core Maintainers** - Guide overall project direction, review SEPs,
  and oversee the specification

<span data-as="p">You can find the current list of maintainers in the <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/blob/main/MAINTAINERS.md"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer"><code>MAINTAINERS.md</code></a> file.</span>
<span data-as="p">Maintainers are here to help you succeed! Don’t
hesitate to reach out if you have questions or need guidance on your
contribution.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#your-first-contribution"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Your First Contribution</span>

<span data-as="p">Start here if you are new to MCP and contributing to
its ecosystem.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">While we use the specification repository as an
example, the key patterns are applicable to other MCP repos as
well.</span>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#step-1-set-up-your-environment"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Step 1: Set Up Your Environment</span>

<span data-as="p">Set up your local environment so you can test and
validate changes before submitting them.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Fork the repository

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Click the **Fork** button on the
<a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">repository page</a> to
create your own copy. This gives you a personal workspace where you can
make changes without affecting the main project.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

2

class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"

Clone your fork

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
git clone https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME/modelcontextprotocol.git
cd modelcontextprotocol
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

username.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This runs TypeScript compilation, schema validation,
example validation, documentation link checks, and formatting checks. If
everything passes, your environment is good and you’re ready to
contribute.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">If `npm run check` fails, see
<a href="contributing.html#troubleshooting"
class="link">Troubleshooting</a> below.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#step-2-find-something-to-work-on"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Step 2: Find Something to Work On</span>

<span data-as="p">While a lot of the items you might see tracked in the
repository can feel intimidating, especially for newcomers, there are
plenty of places where you can start with your first
improvements:</span>

1.  **Documentation improvements** - Help us fix typos, unclear
    explanations, broken links, or incomplete examples
2.  **Issues labeled `good first issue`** - Tackle issues tagged in the
    <a
    href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22"
    class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">specification repo</a>
    as well as our SDK repos
3.  **Schema examples** - Add examples to `schema/draft/examples/` to
    make it easier for developers to understand protocol primitives

###

class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

<span data-as="p">Write a concise message that describes what you
changed and why. Reference issue numbers if applicable (e.g.,

</div>

<a href="contributing.html#step-4-submit-a-pull-request"

aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

<span class="cursor-pointer">Step 4: Submit a Pull Request</span>

<span data-as="p">When you’re ready, push your branch and open a pull
request.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Push your branch

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
git push origin fix/your-description
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

Open a PR on GitHub

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">You can use the
<a href="https://cli.github.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">GitHub CLI</a> to make this process easier:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
gh pr create --fill
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Alternatively, navigate to your fork on GitHub and
click **Compare & pull request**.</span>

</div>

role="listitem">

component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

4

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

Wait for review

days.</span>

callout-type="tip">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="text-green-800 dark:text-green-300 w-3.5 h-auto" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">That’s it, **congratulations on your first
contribution**! Every improvement, no matter how small, helps make MCP
better for everyone.</span>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#what-makes-a-good-contribution"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">What Makes a Good Contribution</span>

<span data-as="p">Help us review your contribution quickly by following
these patterns:</span>

<div class="[--page-padding:20px] overflow-x-auto flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-[var(--page-padding)] max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"
table-wrapper="true">

<div class="px-[var(--page-padding)] grow max-w-none table">

| Harder to Review | Thoughtful and Impactful |
|----|----|
| Large PR with unrelated changes | Focused PR addressing one issue |
| Reformatting code without functional changes | Fixing a bug with a clear explanation |
| Vague commit messages (“fixed stuff”) | Descriptive commits linking to issues |
| Submitting with failing CI checks | All CI tests pass before requesting review |
| Duplicating existing documentation | Documenting an undocumented feature or edge case |

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#types-of-contributions"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Types of Contributions</span>

<span data-as="p">Different contributions follow different processes
depending on their scope.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="tip">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="text-green-800 dark:text-green-300 w-3.5 h-auto" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Not sure which category your change falls into? Ask in
the <a href="communication.html#discord" class="link">MCP Contributor
Discord</a> before starting any significant work.</span>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#small-changes-direct-pr"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Small Changes (Direct PR)</span>

<span data-as="p">Simply submit a pull request directly to the repo
for:</span>

- Bug fixes and typo corrections
- Documentation improvements, such as bringing clarity to an ambiguous
  or unclear section
- Adding examples to existing features
- Minor schema fixes that don’t materially change the specification or
  SDK behavior
- Test improvements

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#major-changes-sep-required"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Major Changes (SEP Required)</span>

<span data-as="p">Anything that changes the MCP specification requires
following the
<a href="sep-guidelines.html" class="link">Specification Enhancement
Proposal (SEP)</a> process. This includes, but is not limited to:</span>

- New protocol features or API methods
- Breaking changes to existing behavior
- Changes to the message format or schema structure
- New interoperability standards
- Governance or process changes

<span data-as="p">Here are a few concrete examples of what would require
following the SEP steps:</span>

- Adding a new RPC method like `tools/execute`
- Changing how authentication and authorization works
- Adding a new capability negotiation field
- Modifying the transport layer specification

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#working-with-the-specification-repository"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Working with the Specification
Repository</span>

<span data-as="p">Once you’ve determined
<a href="contributing.html#types-of-contributions" class="link">what
type of contribution</a> you’re making, here’s how to work with the
specification repository.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#schema-changes"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Schema Changes</span>

<span data-as="p">The TypeScript schema (`schema/draft/schema.ts`) is
the **source of truth** for the protocol. It defines every message type,
request/response structure, and primitive (tools, resources, prompts)
that clients and servers exchange. SDK implementers across all languages
rely on this schema to build conformant implementations.</span>
<span data-as="p">When you run `npm run generate:schema`, it
generates:</span>

- The JSON schema (`schema/draft/schema.json`) for validation
- The Schema Reference documentation
  (`docs/specification/draft/schema.mdx`)

<span data-as="p">To modify the schema:</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Edit the TypeScript schema

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Make your changes in `schema/draft/schema.ts`.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Add examples (optional)

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Add JSON examples in
`schema/draft/examples/[TypeName]/` (e.g., `Tool/my-example.json`).
Reference them in the schema using `@example` + `@includeCode` JSDoc
tags.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

3

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Generate JSON schema and docs

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npm run generate:schema
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part="step-content"]:empty]/step:hidden"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

4

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Validate your changes

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npm run check
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#documentation-changes"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Documentation Changes</span>

<span data-as="p">Docs are written in
<a href="https://mdxjs.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">MDX format</a> (Markdown with JSX components) and
powered by <a href="https://mintlify.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Mintlify</a>. The `docs/` directory contains:</span>

- `docs/docs/` - Guides and tutorials for getting started and building
  with MCP
- `docs/specification/` - Formal protocol specification (versioned by
  date)

<span data-as="p">Here is how you can contribute to our
documentation:</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Start the local docs server

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npm run serve:docs
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This launches a live preview at
`http://localhost:3000` with hot reloading.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Make your changes

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Edit the relevant `.mdx` files. You can use
<a href="https://www.mintlify.com/docs/components" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Mintlify components</a> like `<Note>`,
`<Tip>`, `<Steps>`, and `<Card>` for richer formatting.</span>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part="step-content"]:empty]/step:hidden"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

<div>

3

</div>

Check for issues

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"

floating-buttons="true">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">


<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#major-protocol-changes"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Major Protocol Changes</span>

<span data-as="p">For significant changes, follow the
<a href="sep-guidelines.html" class="link">SEP process</a>. Prior to
spending a lot of time on a spec proposal, make sure to follow these
best practices.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

Validate your idea first

<span data-as="p">Discuss in an
<a href="working-interest-groups.html" class="link">Interest Group</a>
or on
<a href="https://discord.gg/6CSzBmMkjX" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Discord</a>.</span>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

</div>

</div>

Build a prototype

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

3

</div>

role="listitem">

component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#working-with-the-sdk-repositories"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Working with the SDK Repositories</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP maintains official SDKs in multiple languages.
Contributions are welcome - whether you’re fixing bugs, improving
performance, adding features, or enhancing documentation.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Each SDK has its own repository, maintainers, and
contribution guidelines. Some SDKs are maintained in collaboration with
larger partner organizations, such as Google, Microsoft, JetBrains, and
others, so processes may vary slightly between repositories.</span>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#before-contributing-to-an-sdk"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Before Contributing to an SDK</span>

<span data-as="p">Before diving into code, follow these steps.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Open an issue first

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Before starting significant work, open an issue to
discuss your approach. This helps avoid duplicate effort, ensures your
contribution aligns with the SDK’s direction, and gives maintainers a
chance to provide early feedback.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Join the SDK channel

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Find the relevant channel in
<a href="https://discord.gg/6CSzBmMkjX" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Discord</a> (e.g., `#typescript-sdk-dev`,
`#python-sdk-dev`).</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

3

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Read the SDK's CONTRIBUTING.md

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Each repository has its own `CONTRIBUTING.md` with
specific instructions for setting up your development environment,
coding standards, commit message conventions, and PR
requirements.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part="step-content"]:empty]/step:hidden"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

4

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Write tests

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">All contributions should include appropriate test
coverage. Bug fixes should include a test that reproduces the issue, and
new features should have tests covering the expected behavior. This
helps maintain SDK reliability and prevents regressions.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
