## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#getting-help"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Getting Help</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#communication-channels"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Communication Channels</span>

<span data-as="p">Got questions or need guidance? The MCP community is
here to help.</span>

- **<a href="communication.html#discord" class="link">Discord</a>** -
  Real-time discussion with contributors and maintainers, focused on MCP
  contributions (not general MCP support)
- **<a
  href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/discussions"
  class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">GitHub Discussions</a>** -
  Exploration and conversation: **feature requests**, questions, roadmap
  planning, and proposals that need input before becoming concrete tasks
- **<a
  href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/issues"
  class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">GitHub Issues</a>** -
  Actionable work: bug reports with reproducible steps, documentation
  fixes, and tasks that are well-defined and ready to implement (not
  feature requests)

<span data-as="p">This separation helps maintainers focus on work that’s
ready for implementation while giving ideas room to develop. If you’re
unsure whether something is ready to be an issue, start with a
discussion. For a complete guide, see our
<a href="communication.html" class="link">Contributor Communication</a>
documentation.</span> <span data-as="p">For protocol discussions, join
<a href="working-interest-groups.html" class="link">Working Group</a>
channels like `#auth-wg` or `#server-identity-wg`. For SDK help, find
your language’s channel (e.g., `#typescript-sdk-dev`).</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#finding-a-sponsor-for-seps"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Finding a Sponsor for SEPs</span>

<span data-as="p">A **sponsor** is a Core Maintainer or Maintainer who
champions your SEP through the review process. They provide feedback,
help refine your proposal, and present it at Core Maintainer
meetings.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Every SEP needs a sponsor to move forward. SEPs that
don’t find a sponsor within 6 months are marked as **dormant**. Dormant
SEPs aren’t rejected outright - they can be revived later if a sponsor
is found or the proposal is re-assessed to be needed.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">To find a sponsor:</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Find relevant maintainers

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Look at the <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/blob/main/MAINTAINERS.md"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">maintainer list</a> to
find maintainers working in your area.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Tag maintainers in your PR

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Tag 1-2 relevant maintainers (don’t spam
everyone).</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

3

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Share in Discord

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Post your PR in the relevant Discord channel to
increase visibility.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part="step-content"]:empty]/step:hidden"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

4

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="contributing.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Follow up if needed

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">If no response after 2 weeks, ask in `#general` or
reach out to a Core Maintainer.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Maintainers review open proposals regularly, but
response time varies based on complexity and availability.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#troubleshooting"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Troubleshooting</span>

<span data-as="p">Sometimes things don’t go as planned - that’s
completely normal! Here are solutions to common issues. If you’re still
stuck, don’t hesitate to ask for help in
<a href="communication.html#discord" class="link">Discord</a>. The
community is friendly and happy to help you get unstuck.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#npm-run-check-fails"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`npm run check` fails</span>

<span data-as="p">Common causes:</span>

- **Wrong Node.js version** - Ensure you have Node.js 24+
- **Missing dependencies** - Run `npm install` again
- **Schema out of sync** - Run `npm run generate:schema`
- **Formatting issues** - Run `npm run format` to auto-fix

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#my-pr-has-been-sitting-unnoticed-for-weeks"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">My PR has been sitting unnoticed for
weeks</span>

1.  Ensure all CI checks pass
2.  Politely ping the desired reviewer in a comment
3.  Ask in the relevant Discord channel
4.  For urgent issues, reach out to a Core Maintainer

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#i-can’t-find-a-sponsor-for-my-sep"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">I can’t find a sponsor for my SEP</span>

1.  Make sure your idea has been discussed in Discord or an Interest
    Group first
2.  Proposals with demonstrated community interest are more likely to
    find sponsors
3.  Consider whether your change might be too large - could it be split
    into smaller SEPs?

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#my-sep-was-rejected"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">My SEP was rejected</span>

<span data-as="p">Don’t take it personally - a SEP rejection doesn’t
mean your idea was bad. SEPs can be rejected for many reasons: timing,
scope, competing priorities, or simply because the protocol isn’t ready
for that change yet. The feedback you receive is valuable and often
points toward a path forward.</span> <span data-as="p">Rejection is not
permanent. You have a few options ahead:</span>

1.  **Address the feedback and resubmit** - Often, rejection comes with
    specific concerns. Addressing those concerns and resubmitting can be
    the right path forward.
2.  **Discuss in Discord** - Talk with maintainers to better understand
    the concerns. Sometimes a brief conversation reveals a simpler path
    forward.
3.  **Try a different approach** - Submit a new SEP that addresses the
    same problem differently, incorporating what you learned.
4.  **Wait for the right moment** - Circumstances change. New use cases
    emerge, the community grows, and priorities shift. An idea rejected
    today might be welcomed tomorrow.

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#out-of-scope"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Out of Scope</span>

<span data-as="p">This guide covers contributions to the **core MCP
project** - the specification, official SDKs, and documentation.</span>
<span data-as="p">Building your own MCP servers, clients, or tools is
**not** covered here. For guidance on building with MCP, see our
documentation:</span>

- <a href="../docs/develop/build-server.html" class="link">Build a
  Server</a>
- <a href="../docs/develop/build-client.html" class="link">Build a
  Client</a>
- <a href="../examples.html" class="link">Example Servers</a>

<span data-as="p">If you build something you’d like to share with the
community, you can submit it to the
<a href="../registry/about.html" class="link">MCP Registry</a>.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#ai-contributions"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">AI Contributions</span>

<span data-as="p">We welcome the use of AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT
to help with your contributions! If you do use AI assistance, just let
us know in your pull request or issue - a quick note about how you used
it (drafting docs, generating code, brainstorming, etc.) is all we
need.</span> <span data-as="p">The key is that you understand and can
stand behind your contribution:</span>

- **You get it** - You understand what the changes do and can explain
  them
- **You know why** - You can articulate why the change is needed
- **You’ve verified it** - You’ve tested or validated that it works as
  intended

<span data-as="p">You can read more about our stance in <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#ai-contributions"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">our spec contribution
guidelines</a>.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#code-of-conduct"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Code of Conduct</span>

<span data-as="p">All contributors must follow the <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Code of Conduct</a>. We
expect respectful, professional, and inclusive interactions across all
channels.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="contributing.html#license"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">License</span>

<span data-as="p">By contributing, you agree that your contributions
will be licensed under:</span>

- **Code and specifications**: Apache License 2.0
- **Documentation** (excluding specifications): CC-BY 4.0

<span data-as="p">See the <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/blob/main/LICENSE"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">LICENSE</a> file for
details.</span>

</div>
